prompt: Create a photorealistic yet cute lifestyle food photo inside a warm sunlit dessert café, featuring exactly two large cone crepes in pink gingham paper sleeves standing upright in a cream metal holder with a small heart detail on a light wooden table. The left crepe is filled with whipped cream, chocolate drizzle, and crunchy toppings; the right crepe is filled with whipped cream, strawberry slices, small red berries, and a tiny smiling yellow heart-shaped cookie. Beside them are exactly two clear plastic takeaway drinks with dome lids and pale pink straws: one pastel strawberry-pink drink topped with whipped cream and strawberry pieces, and one bright yellow mango/lemon drink topped with whipped cream and yellow fruit bits; both cups have simple cute smiling faces and a small circular café logo reading “ANGEL CREPES.” Add exactly one pair of round pink sunglasses lying in front of the drinks. The background is softly blurred with a large window on the left showing green foliage, peach-pink curtains, cozy wooden café shelving, stools, plants, and a pink framed crepe illustration on the right. Overlay the photo with hand-drawn pastel doodles and Japanese handwritten notes in white, pink, and yellow, as if drawn with a marker: exactly five main text doodles, reading 美食と いい気分, 超かわいい クレープ♡, 休日の バケーション, 完璧な旅, and 一口ごとに 価値がある♡. Include additional decorative doodles: hearts, sparkles, a sun icon, arrows pointing to the crepes and drinks, motion lines, and a dotted looping line. Use golden-hour lighting, shallow depth of field, soft bokeh, pastel pink and cream color palette, cheerful vacation mood, realistic food texture, and playful kawaii handwritten annotation style.
